description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric. This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its colour patterning. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric caressing your skin. Product Details Green Jaipur printed stole, has tassels along the edges Material and Care 100% silk Dry clean only Size Length: 170 cm Width: 55 cm
